title: peuce balsamea
intro: Peuce balsamea, also known as white sandalwood, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of China, characterized by its fragrant wood and essential oil. The medicinal properties of Peuce balsamea include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Peuce balsamea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of Peuce balsamea include essential oil, powder, and tea, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
